hello! i'm wondering if anyone has a simple explanation for how realm conflicts work in your lineup
to be more specific, my current favs in my team are vortice, leigh and agrippa, and i want to get arachnae as well but am worried i will not be able to equip her
You can't have more than 2 different realms in your team
So the game limits you to having 2 realms at a time

damn, so theres no path?
no "here are the must haves"?
u can look at my tierlist to see what i recommend
the newbie one
but this game is complicated, meta changes
some old units fell off others are still op
new units can come out and make old units suddenly top tier
so giving "must pull" advice is not really possible
just pull whatever u like and is good
also there are no units that are completely useless
so even if u like an off meta unit you can still clear endgame with them
there r strong units but the game isnt hard enough that u need them to clear
and the game isnt unbalamced enough that certain units r too OP
well
if mouchette or thais or horla banner was up rn
i would be saying pull that one
but theres no super op banners
thais horla is up
only moonless which is not guaranteed
ye moonless
last 2 slots kinda cringe
u should definitely pull moonless a bit
but u might get unlucky
and get everything except thais horla
